general.name: mos_target_galex_gr7_gaia_dr3_parquet
general.description: Cross-match between the Gaia DR3 catalogue and the GALEX General Release 7 catalogue. For more details about the GALEX columns refer to https://archive.stsci.edu/prepds/gcat/gcat_dataproducts.html.
general.naming_convention: $MOS_TARGET/[V_TARG]/[FTYPE]/mos_galex_gr7_gaia_dr3.[FTYPE] with FTYPE='parquet' and V_TARG='2.0.0' for DR20.

changelog.description: Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another

gaia_edr3_source_id.name: gaia_edr3_source_id
gaia_edr3_source_id.description: Gaia DR3 source identifier. Matches the source_id column in the dr20_gaia_dr3_source table.

galex_objid.name: galex_objid
galex_objid.description: This is the 64-bit integer version of the global object ID uniquely identifying this source including the tile number, band, product number, and other parameters, in the Gaia General Release 7 catalogue.

fuv_mag.name: fuv_mag
fuv_mag.description: Calibrated FUV magnitude on the AB system measured within the NUV-defined "AUTO" aperture. Sources with either a negative FLUX_FUV or without FUV observations will be flagged with values of either +99 or -99.

fuv_magerr.name: fuv_magerr
fuv_magerr.description: The error in MAG_FUV. Sources with either a negative flux or without FUV observations will be flagged with values of either +99 or -99.

nuv_mag.name: nuv_mag
nuv_mag.description: Calibrated NUV magnitude on the AB system. This is currently always set to the SExtractor "AUTO" magnitude.

galex_separation.name: galex_separation
galex_separation.description: Separation between the Gaia DR3 source and the GALEX GR7 source.

pk.name: pk
pk.description: Unique identifier for each row in the table.
